_about: In-combat cut-in famous-quote banner: the quote text lives in the compressed quote resource (file 1dc, grown for full-length translated lines); the code image holds the 943-entry u32 offset table into the decompressed resource (last entry doubles as the whole-resource size sentinel) plus one resource-size word that must equal the rebuilt file's length.  The per-record offsets are DERIVED from battle/cutin_quotes.json at build time (utils/arm9_layout.py _apply_cutin_offsets); this file only pins the table location/count and the size-word location.
